heading: Polisbet vs Pomborneit East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Polisbet, Victoria and Pomborneit East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Polisbet has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Pomborneit East (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Polisbet or Pomborneit East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Polisbet has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Pomborneit East scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Polisbet scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Pomborneit East scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Polisbet or Pomborneit East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Polisbet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
